title: 6 PCS 13cm Glitter Candy Cane Christmas Tree Decorations, Glitter Candy Cane Christmas Tree Hanging Decoration Bauble Xmas Ornament, Red + White
features: Candy cane themed Christmas decorations are made of plastic, with smooth surfaces to make them shine and white glitter to make them more delicate
These Christmas sticks Christmas candy decor measures about 13 cm / 5.07 inches in length, suitable size for dressing up your Christmas tree
The Christmas tree decorations candy cane is glitter, comes with a gold top and gold string loop attached. A great choice for festival Christmas home decoration

The hanging candy canes can dress up your Christmas tree, designed in classic colors that nicely fit the Christmas theme, ideal for Christmas decorations that bring more fun and cuteness to your Christmas party

These Christmas Tree Hanging Baubles festival candy cane decorations are sure to brighten up your Christmas tree! Xmas tree ornaments can be hung as Christmas decorations on trees and potted plants, or displayed on fireplaces, doors, walls, windows, ceilings and staircase railings.
description: Product description 6 Pieces of Christmas Glitter Candy Cane Christmas Tree Decorations Ornament Walking Stick Pendant Decorations, Red Specifications: Material: plastic Color: Red Candy size: 13 cm / 5.07 inch in length Wide Application: The candy cane is perfect for decorating Christmas trees, doors, walls, windows, wreaths, desks, tables, etc. And can be widely applied in kindergartens, stores, offices, hotels and restaurants, and bars during Christmas. Package includes: 6 x Christmas Hanging Candy Cane Ornaments Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Do not place in high places where it can fall and cause injury.
